lines: Butters, you absolute state — sitting pretty at the top on 80pts but Portugal just got absolutely fucked 0-1 by Spain, so that's your star boy Ronaldo waddling off into retirement while Jim sits back laughing his smug bastard face off. Jim's up to something with Spain AND Morocco still breathing — watch that prick creep up the table.

Wilmot, third place on 75pts and somehow you've backed England, Morocco, AND Norway like some kind of deluded fortune-telling cunt — three teams still in it, yet you've done absolutely fuck all interesting with any of them. You didn't earn that, you just got lucky, you talentless sweepstake parasite.

Ellis — last place on 38pts, one team left in Argentina, and the rest of your picks got binned faster than a shit sandwich. Argentina vs Egypt today is literally the only thing standing between her and total irrelevance, and knowing her luck Messi pulls a hamstring in the warmup.

Today's the day Carter and The Foreman find out if Colombia can squeeze past Switzerland — two of the miserable bastards sharing the same team, which means neither of them can fully enjoy it without the other one also winning, which is a special kind of purgatory.

Keep your eyes on Colombia vs Switzerland — if Carter's mob go through, he claws back ground on the top three, and if they don't, both Carter AND The Foreman can go fuck themselves into the middle distance together.
